title: Dekton 3m Flexible Drain & Pipe Unblocker-Removes Clogging Caused By Hair & Dirt| Ideal For Cleaning Kitchen Sinks, Bathroom, Syphons| Long, Flexible Spiral Tools| Unblocks Drain Without Chemical Aids
features: Removes Clogging Caused by Hair & Dirt: The Dekton 3m Flexible Drain & Pipe Unblocker is specially designed to effectively remove clogs caused by hair, dirt, soap scum, and other debris that can accumulate in your drains. Its robust design ensures that even the toughest blockages are quickly and efficiently cleared.

Ideal for Cleaning Kitchen Sinks, Bathrooms, and Syphons: This versatile tool is perfect for use in various areas of your home, including kitchen sinks, bathroom drains, showers, bathtubs, and syphons. The 3-meter length allows you to reach deep into pipes, ensuring a thorough clean and preventing future blockages

Long, Flexible Spiral Tool: Featuring a long, flexible spiral design, the Dekton Drain & Pipe Unblocker can easily navigate through bends and curves in your pipes, reaching areas that are typically difficult to access with standard tools. Its flexibility ensures that it can adapt to the shape of the pipe.

Unblocks Drains Without Chemical Aids: Unlike harsh chemical drain cleaners that can damage your pipes and the environment, the Dekton Unblocker provides a safe, mechanical solution to clogged drains. By using this tool, you can unblock your drains effectively without the need for potentially harmful chemical agents

Reusable and Environmentally Friendly: The Dekton Flexible Drain & Pipe Unblocker is designed for multiple uses, making it a cost-effective and environmentally friendly choice. After clearing a clog, simply clean the tool and store it for future use. This reusability helps reduce waste and minimizes the need for disposable, single-use products.
description: The Dekton 3m Flexible Drain & Pipe Unblocker is a must-have tool for maintaining clear and functional drains in your home. Designed to effectively remove clogs caused by hair, dirt, and other debris, this versatile tool is perfect for cleaning kitchen sinks, bathroom drains, and syphons without the need for harsh chemical aids. The unblocker features a long, flexible spiral that effortlessly navigates through bends and tight spaces in pipes, reaching deep into your plumbing to dislodge and clear blockages. With a total length of 3 meters, it offers ample reach to tackle even the most stubborn clogs, ensuring that your drains remain free-flowing and efficient. Crafted with durability in mind, the Dekton Flexible Drain & Pipe Unblocker is built to last, making it a reliable addition to your home maintenance toolkit. The flexible spiral is made from high-quality materials that resist corrosion and wear, ensuring consistent performance over time. Its user-friendly design allows for easy operation—simply insert the tool into the drain, rotate the handle to engage the spiral, and guide it through the pipe to remove the blockage. The handle is ergonomically designed for a comfortable grip, providing you with greater control and precision during use. This drain unblocker is an environmentally friendly alternative to chemical cleaners, offering a safe and effective way to clear drains without harming your pipes or the environment.
